Class SwingView

java.lang.Object
com.runticket.view.SwingView
public class SwingView extends Object
The SwingView class handles all GUI output for the TicketMiner application using Java Swing. It provides methods to display menus, messages, and formatted information to the user with a modern, professional Apple/Tesla-inspired design.
Author:
Adrian Sifuentes, Henry Ng, Sebastian Marquez

    Constructor

    Constructor for SwingView - initializes the GUI

  • Constructor Details

    • SwingView

      public SwingView()
      Constructor for SwingView - initializes the GUI

  • Method Details

    • appendTextToDisplay

      public void appendTextToDisplay(String text)
      Public method to append text to the display area.

    • getStringInput

      public String getStringInput(String message, String title)
      Gets string input from user via inline form in control panel. Blocks the calling thread until input is submitted.
      Parameters:
      message - the prompt message
      title - the form title
      Returns:
      the user's input string, or null if cancelled

    • getIntInput

      public int getIntInput(String message, String title)
      Gets integer input from user via input form.
      Parameters:
      message - the prompt message
      title - the dialog title
      Returns:
      the user's input integer, or -1 if cancelled/invalid

    • getDoubleInput

      public double getDoubleInput(String message, String title)
      Gets double input from user via input form.
      Parameters:
      message - the prompt message
      title - the dialog title
      Returns:
      the user's input double, or -1 if cancelled/invalid

    • showOptionDialog

      public int showOptionDialog(String messageText, String titleText, String[] options)
      Shows option buttons inline in control panel for user selection. Blocks the calling thread until an option is selected.
      Parameters:
      messageText - the message to display
      titleText - the form title
      options - array of option strings
      Returns:
      the selected option index, or -1 if cancelled

    • showYesNoDialog

      public boolean showYesNoDialog(String message, String title)
      Shows yes/no buttons inline in control panel.
      Parameters:
      message - the message to display
      title - the form title
      Returns:
      true if yes, false if no or cancelled

    • displayCustomerMenu

      public void displayCustomerMenu()

    • switchView

      public void switchView(String viewName)
      Switches the view to show events, customers, details, or log
      Parameters:
      viewName - "EVENTS", "CUSTOMERS", "DETAILS", or "LOG"

    • displayAvailableEvents

      public void displayAvailableEvents(ConcurrentHashMap<Integer,Event> eventList)
      Updates the events table in the main window with the provided list of events. Shows enhanced information including seats available and pricing.
      Parameters:
      eventList - A HashMap containing all available events

    • displayCustomers

      public void displayCustomers(ConcurrentHashMap<String,Customer> customerList)
      Updates the customers table in the main window with the provided list of customers.
      Parameters:
      customerList - A HashMap containing all customers

    • displayVenues

      public void displayVenues(ConcurrentHashMap<String,Venue> venueList)
      Displays the list of venues in the display area.
      Parameters:
      venueList -

    • displayEventRevenue

      public void displayEventRevenue(Event event)
      Displays detailed revenue report for a specific event in the details panel.
      Parameters:
      event - The event for which to display the revenue report

    • displayEventFees

      public void displayEventFees(Event event)
      Displays fee information for a specific event
      Parameters:
      event - The event for which to display fees

    • displayAllFees

      public void displayAllFees(double totalTicketFees, double totalConvenienceFees, double totalCharityFees, double grandTotalFees)
      Displays fee information for all events
      Parameters:
      totalTicketFees - Total service fees across all events
      totalConvenienceFees - Total convenience fees across all events
      totalCharityFees - Total charity fees across all events
      grandTotalFees - Total fees across all events

    • displayEventCancellationResults

      public void displayEventCancellationResults(Event event, int refundCount, double totalRefunded)
      Displays event cancellation results
      Parameters:
      event - The cancelled event
      refundCount - Number of customers refunded
      totalRefunded - Total amount refunded

    • displayEventDetailsWithCapacity

      public void displayEventDetailsWithCapacity(Event event)
      Displays detailed information about a specific event in the details panel, including seat availability.
      Parameters:
      event - The event for which to display details

    • displayEventAddedConfirmation

      public void displayEventAddedConfirmation(Event event)
      Displays a confirmation message and the event details after successfully adding an event
      Parameters:
      event - the event that was just added

    • displayInvoice

      public void displayInvoice(Invoice invoice)
      Displays detailed invoice information in the details panel.
      Parameters:
      invoice - The invoice to display

    • displayInvoices

      public void displayInvoices(HashMap<String,Invoice> invoices)
      Displays a list of invoices in the details panel.
      Parameters:
      invoices - A HashMap of invoice IDs to Invoice objects

    • displayReceipts

      public void displayReceipts(String customerFullName, boolean append)
      Displays receipt files for a customer in the details panel. Reads receipt files from the receipts folder that match the customer's name.
      Parameters:
      customerFullName - The full name of the customer (First Last)
      append - If true, appends receipts to existing content instead of clearing

    • displayReceipts

      public void displayReceipts(String customerFullName)
      Overloaded method for backward compatibility - clears panel by default

    • displayInvoicesAndReceipts

      public void displayInvoicesAndReceipts(HashMap<String,Invoice> invoices, String customerFullName)
      Displays both invoices and receipts for a customer in the details panel. Shows invoices first, then receipts below them.
      Parameters:
      invoices - The customer's invoices HashMap
      customerFullName - The full name of the customer (First Last)

    • displayAutoPurchaseLoading

      public void displayAutoPurchaseLoading(String filename)
      Displays a loading/processing message in the details panel while auto purchase is running.
      Parameters:
      filename - The name of the file being processed

    • displayAutoPurchaseResults

      public void displayAutoPurchaseResults(List<Invoice> invoices, int totalProcessed, int successful, int failed)
      Displays auto purchase results in the details panel. Shows a summary and all successfully created invoices.
      Parameters:
      invoices - The list of invoices created by the auto purchaser
      totalProcessed - The total number of purchase attempts processed
      successful - The number of successful purchases
      failed - The number of failed purchases

    • displayCustomerInfo

      public void displayCustomerInfo(Customer customer)
      Displays customer information in the details panel. Shows amount of purchases, available funds, first name, last name, password, and username.
      Parameters:
      customer - The customer whose information to display
